from PIL import Image
import glob, os

for png in glob.glob\('G:/Personal/blenderKey/keymap_visualizer/icons/**/*.png', recursive=True\):
    img = Image.open\(png\)
    if img.size != \(64, 64\):
        img_resized = img.resize\(\(64, 64\), Image.LANCZOS\)
        img_resized.save\(png\)
        print\(f'Resized: {os.path.basename\(png\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'Already 64x64: {os.path.basename\(png\)}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json, subprocess, os, concurrent.futures, urllib.request

with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Devanshu\\.claude\\projects\\G--Personal-blenderKey\\ddf5bf81-aa63-478a-a57f-40bc81375637\\tool-results\\bq57hxk8r.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

out_dir = r'G:\\Personal\\blenderKey\\blender_icons_svg'
base_url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blender/blender/main/release/datafiles/icons_svg/'

def download\(item\):
    name = item['name']
    url = base_url + name
    path = os.path.join\(out_dir, name\)
    if os.path.exists\(path\):
        return f'SKIP {name}'
    try:
        urllib.request.urlretrieve\(url, path\)
        return f'OK {name}'
    except Exception as e:
        return f'FAIL {name}: {e}'

with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor\(max_workers=20\) as executor:
    results = list\(executor.map\(download, data\)\)

ok = sum\(1 for r in results if r.startswith\('OK'\)\)
fail = [r for r in results if r.startswith\('FAIL'\)]
print\(f'Downloaded: {ok}/{len\(data\)}'\)
if fail:
    print\(f'Failed \({len\(fail\)}\):'\)
    for f in fail[:10]:
        print\(f'  {f}'\)
" 2>&1)
